title: carex elata subsp. elata
intro: Carex elata subsp. elata, also known as the brown sedge, is a perennial plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex elata subsp. elata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support respiratory health. Carex elata subsp. elata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and optimal uses.
